selection.caveat: window boundaries derive from LLM-generated timestamps; frames are canonical
transcript_excerpt: [38s-46s] The wearer turns right again, walks to the bin, and scoops another handful of metal parts with their left hand.
[46s-49s] Back at the workstation, the wearer pushes a long, flat metal guide bar upwards along the sloped surface using their left hand.
[49s-53s] They immediately turn right, walk to the bin, and scoop another handful of parts.
[53s-70s] At the workstation, the repetitive task continues: the wearer places individual parts on the surface with the left hand and strikes them firmly with the hammer held in the right hand.
window_activities: sweep separated parts with metal guide bar
scoop loose parts from bulk bin
